title: Top 10 Must-Watch Movies of 2020
description: The article lists the top 10 movies of 2020, including Parasite, The Trial of the Chicago 7, Ma Rainey's Black Bottom, Soul, Da 5 Bloods, Hamilton, Mank, The Invisible Man, Onward, and Sound of Metal.

title: 2020 in Review: Major Events and Headlines
description: A table lists the major events of 2020, including the COVID-19 pandemic, the US presidential election, and various international conflicts and tragedies.

title: Parasite Makes History at 2020 Oscars
description: The 92nd Academy Awards saw history being made as Parasite became the first non-English language film to win Best Picture, while Bong Joon-ho became the first South Korean director to win Best Director. Other winners included Joaquin Phoenix for Best Actor, Renee Zellweger for Best Actress, Brad Pitt for Best Supporting Actor, and Laura Dern for Best Supporting Actress. Toy Story 4 won Best Animated Feature, American Factory won Best Documentary Feature, and Elton John and Bernie Taupin's "(I'm Gonna) Love Me Again" from Rocketman won Best Original Song.

title: 2020's Major Movies: Popularity, Ratings, and Awards
description: The article provides an example of an HTML table listing major movies of 2020, including their popularity, ratings, and awards. The information is based on data available up to early 2023, but the ratings and awards may change over time.
